title_en: Introduction to A Brief Guide to Understanding Islam
content_en:
A concise and accessible introduction to Islam for those with no prior knowledge of the religion. The book presents the basic articles of Islamic faith, the evidence for the truth of Islam, the message of the Quran, and some of the scientific signs mentioned in the Quran that have been confirmed by modern science.

Written in simple language suitable for non-Muslims inquiring about Islam and new Muslims seeking a foundational understanding, the book covers: the Islamic understanding of God (tawhid), prophethood, the Quran, and the Day of Judgment; evidence for the truth of the Quran; the benefits of Islam for individuals and society; and an introduction to the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him).

One of the most widely distributed introductory guides to Islam, this book has been translated into many languages and distributed through Islamic centers worldwide. Its clear, direct style and focus on evidence makes it an effective introduction to the Islamic worldview for readers of all backgrounds.
